title: Complete checkout and submit an order
description: A shopper can review the cart, proceed to checkout, enter billing and shipping details, and submit an order successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Open a product from the catalog
Select a valid size
Select a valid color
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Proceed to checkout
Fill in the billing details form
Fill in the shipping details form
Submit the order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed

title: Complete checkout and receive confirmation
description: This verifies that a shopper can review the order summary, enter billing and shipping details, submit the checkout form, and see an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Review the order summary
Enter valid billing details
Enter valid shipping details
Submit the checkout form
Verify an order confirmation is visible
Verify the order submission completed successfully

title: Select variants and add a product to the cart
description: A shopper can choose available size and color options on a product page and add the selected item to the cart successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Open a product from the catalog
Select a valid size
Select a valid color
Add the product to the cart
Verify the cart reflects the added item

title: Select a product configuration and add it to the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can choose product variants, add the configured item to the cart, and see the selection reflected in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /product/midnight-silk-slip
Select a color variant
Select a size option
Add the item to the cart
Verify the cart shows the selected product configuration
Verify the cart contains the added item

title: Update cart quantity and subtotal
description: A shopper can change the quantity of an item in the cart and see the subtotal update to match the new amount.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Open a product from the catalog
Select a valid size
Select a valid color
Add the product to the cart
Open the cart
Change the item quantity
Verify the cart subtotal is updated

title: Update cart quantities and continue to checkout
description: This verifies that a shopper can adjust item quantities in the cart, see the subtotal update, and continue to checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Increase an item quantity
Decrease an item quantity
Verify the cart subtotal is updated
Proceed to checkout
Verify the checkout page is displayed

title: Browse the catalog by collection and price
description: A shopper can filter the catalog to a collection and sort the results by price so the visible products update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Select the Silk Dreams collection filter
Verify only matching products are displayed
Select the price low to high sorting option
Verify the catalog is reordered by price

title: Preserve selected variants in the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can add a configured product from the shop and later confirm the chosen size and color are preserved in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Add a selected item to the cart
Navigate to /cart
Verify the selected size is shown in the cart
Verify the selected color is shown in the cart

title: Open a product from the catalog and inspect its details
description: A shopper can open a product detail page from the catalog and review the product information before buying.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Open a product from the catalog
Verify the product detail page is displayed
Verify product details are displayed

title: Navigate through the main brand pages
description: A shopper can move between the home, shop, collections, about, and contact pages using the main navigation and remain within the site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the shopping catalog
Verify the product catalog is displayed
Click the link to explore the collections story
Verify the collections page is displayed
Click the link to read the brand story
Verify the about page is displayed
Click the link to open the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Review checkout totals before placing an order
description: This verifies that a shopper can inspect the estimated totals on checkout before submitting the order.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Review the order summary
Review the estimated totals
Verify the order summary is displayed
Verify the estimated totals are displayed

title: Review the home page discovery content
description: A visitor can land on the home page and scroll through the featured brand sections, bestsellers, and testimonials.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify featured brand content is displayed
Scroll through the home page
Verify bestsellers and customer testimonials are displayed

title: Review product details and recommendations
description: This verifies that a shopper can inspect product information and related recommendations on the product details page.

steps.description: Navigate to /product/midnight-silk-slip
Scroll to the product details sections
Verify fabric, care, and fit details are displayed
Verify related product recommendations are displayed

title: Keep cart contents while navigating the site
description: A shopper can add an item to the cart, move across other pages, and return to the cart without losing the selected item.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Open a product from the catalog
Select a valid size
Select a valid color
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to view the home page
Click the link to view the shopping catalog
Open the cart
Verify the cart still contains the added item

title: Submit a contact inquiry successfully
description: A visitor can send a contact inquiry from the contact page and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Select a subject for the inquiry
Type a message into the message field
Submit the form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Use the collections and contact journey
description: A visitor can read the collections and brand story pages, then submit an inquiry through the contact form and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Verify the collections storytelling page is displayed
Click the link to read the brand story
Verify the about page is displayed
Click the link to open the contact page
Fill in the inquiry message form
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Read the collections narrative on the collections page
description: A visitor can open the collections page and review the curated storytelling content for the brand's featured themes.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Verify the curated collection narrative is visible
Verify featured collection themes are visible

title: Learn about the founder and philosophy on the about page
description: A visitor can use the about page to review the founder background and brand philosophy.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify founder information is visible
Verify brand philosophy content is visible

title: Understand the brand aesthetic direction from collections content
description: A visitor can use the collections page to learn how the brand presents its aesthetic direction and craftsmanship story.

steps.description: Navigate to /collections
Verify brand craftsmanship storytelling is visible
Verify the brand's aesthetic direction is visible

title: Read the brand origin story on the about page
description: A visitor can open the about page and learn the brand's origin story.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the origin story is visible

title: Reject an incomplete contact submission
description: A visitor who leaves a required contact form field empty sees validation feedback and cannot submit the inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Select a subject for the inquiry
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify a success confirmation is not visible

title: Show cart empty state before any items are added
description: A shopper who opens the cart before selecting anything sees an empty state instead of cart contents.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify an empty cart message is displayed
